parameters.query: SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, date_of_birth, gender, consent_status, created_at, psychologist_id FROM patients WHERE id = $1::uuid AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, appointment_type, status, session_notes, google_meet_link, created_at FROM appointments WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY scheduled_at DESC

SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'occupation', t.occupation, 'marital_status', t.marital_status, 'number_of_children', t.number_of_children, 'education_level', t.education_level, 'religion', t.religion, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM demographics t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS demographics,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'complaint_text', t.complaint_text, 'symptom_duration', t.symptom_duration, 'symptom_onset', t.symptom_onset, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM chief_complaint t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS chief_complaint,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'medical_conditions', t.medical_conditions, 'surgeries', t.surgeries, 'current_medications', t.current_medications, 'allergies', t.allergies, 'previous_psychiatric_treatment', t.previous_psychiatric_treatment, 'previous_hospitalization', t.previous_hospitalization, 'psychiatric_treatment_details', t.psychiatric_treatment_details, 'alcohol_use', t.alcohol_use, 'tobacco_use', t.tobacco_use, 'drug_use', t.drug_use, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM personal_history t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS personal_history,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'family_composition', t.family_composition, 'family_psychiatric_illness', t.family_psychiatric_illness, 'family_medical_conditions', t.family_medical_conditions, 'family_substance_abuse', t.family_substance_abuse, 'family_suicide_history', t.family_suicide_history, 'parental_relationship', t.parental_relationship, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM family_history t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS family_history,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'pregnancy_complications', t.pregnancy_complications, 'birth_complications', t.birth_complications, 'developmental_milestones', t.developmental_milestones, 'childhood_traumas', t.childhood_traumas, 'school_performance', t.school_performance, 'significant_life_events', t.significant_life_events, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM developmental_history t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS developmental_history,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'appearance', t.appearance, 'mood', t.mood, 'speech', t.speech, 'thought_process', t.thought_process, 'thought_content', t.thought_content, 'intellect_level', t.intellect_level, 'insight', t.insight, 'judgment', t.judgment, 'tests_administered', t.tests_administered, 'evaluation_results', t.evaluation_results, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM psychological_evaluation t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS psychological_evaluation,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'primary_diagnosis_code', t.primary_diagnosis_code, 'primary_diagnosis_name', t.primary_diagnosis_name, 'diagnosis_description', t.diagnosis_description, 'comorbid_diagnoses', t.comorbid_diagnoses, 'severity', t.severity, 'diagnostic_impression', t.diagnostic_impression, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM diagnosis t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS diagnosis,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'short_term_goals', t.short_term_goals, 'long_term_goals', t.long_term_goals, 'therapy_modality', t.therapy_modality, 'planned_duration_weeks', t.planned_duration_weeks, 'estimated_sessions', t.estimated_sessions, 'session_frequency', t.session_frequency, 'interventions', t.interventions, 'referrals', t.referrals, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM treatment_plan t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS treatment_plan,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'country_normative', t.country_normative, 'consent_type', t.consent_type, 'consent_text', t.consent_text, 'signed_at', t.signed_at, 'ip_address', t.ip_address, 'status', t.status, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM consentimientos t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY t.created_at DESC) AS consentimientos,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'appearance', t.appearance, 'behavior', t.behavior, 'speech', t.speech, 'mood', t.mood, 'affect', t.affect, 'thought_process', t.thought_process, 'thought_content', t.thought_content, 'perception', t.perception, 'cognition', t.cognition, 'insight', t.insight, 'judgment', t.judgment, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM mental_status_exam t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS mental_status_exam,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'living_situation', t.living_situation, 'employment_status', t.employment_status, 'social_support', t.social_support, 'relationships', t.relationships, 'hobbies', t.hobbies, 'stressors', t.stressors, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM social_profile t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS social_profile,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'temperament', t.temperament, 'character_traits', t.character_traits, 'coping_mechanisms', t.coping_mechanisms, 'defense_mechanisms', t.defense_mechanisms, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM personality_profile t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS personality_profile,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', t.id, 'summary', t.summary, 'formulation', t.formulation, 'prognosis', t.prognosis, 'recommendations', t.recommendations, 'version', t.version, 'is_current', t.is_current, 'created_at', t.created_at)) FROM clinical_impression t WHERE t.patient_id = $1::uuid AND t.is_current = TRUE) AS clinical_impression
INSERT INTO audit_log (table_name, record_id, operation, psychologist_id) VALUES ('patients', $1::uuid, 'EXPORT', $2::uuid)
